use_cases: Dashboard grid layouts with interactive 3D card effects
Showcase sections with spotlight hover interactions
Product feature cards with depth and perspective
Interactive gallery items with mouse-tracking effects
Pricing or feature comparison cards with premium feel
ai_summary: A holographic BentoItem component featuring 3D tilt effects and spotlight animations that follow the cursor, creating an immersive glass-morphism aesthetic. The component uses CSS perspective transforms and JavaScript mouse tracking to deliver dynamic depth effects on hover. Ideal for modern SaaS dashboards and developer tool interfaces seeking a premium, interactive card experience.
